name: zsys_has_cpuid_support_runtime_options
description: zSys::HasCpuidSupportRuntimeOptions models the CPUID-support probe used by zGame/zSound runtime option setup.
known_limits: Retail contains a second CPUID-support probe at 0x4b2fe0 with a different register-preservation shape from the zsys_cpu.cpp helper at 0x4b33f0.
The functional source delegates to zSys::HasCpuidSupport and normalizes the caller-visible boolean result; binary-safe work remains separate.
